findings.title: Router address bypasses generated wagmi address source

rule.quote: Blockchain reads/writes go through wagmi/viem and ethers v5 providers, using addresses from `wagmi.config.ts` and environment-specific signer keys.

findings.description: The FAME router contract is added to `wagmi.config.ts` and generated into `src/wagmi/index.ts`, but the feature introduces a second hard-coded default address in `DEFAULT_FAME_ROUTER_ADDRESS` and the quote endpoint consumes `getFameSwapConfig().routerAddress` for live router policy reads. That duplicates the deployed contract address outside the wagmi-generated address source required by the project guide, so future config regeneration can drift from the runtime quote path.
findings.recommendation: Source the default router address from the generated wagmi address map, for example `fameRouterAddress[base.id]`, and keep any environment override layered on top only if needed for local fork/dev routing.
